home.heroTitle: Empower Local Commerce, Transform Your Community
home.heroDescription: Have more than 1,000 followers? Create your unique code, offer 10% on first purchase, and earn tier-based commissions for 18 months.
home.certifiedQualityDesc: Every product comes with verifiable certificates. Complete transparency from origin to your table.
home.aiAssistantDesc: Discover products perfect for you with personalized recommendations based on your preferences.
home.localCommerceDesc: Support producers in your region. Connect directly with those who craft quality products.
home.globalReachDesc: Connect with certified sellers from around the world. Support quality craftsmanship.
home.missionText: We were born to revolutionize local commerce. We believe every entrepreneur deserves a platform to shine, and every consumer deserves access to authentic, quality products. Together, we build stronger communities.
home.forSellersDesc: Take your business to the next level. No technical hassles, just results.
home.forInfluencersDesc: Earn by sharing real products. Tier-based commissions (3%-7%) with 18-month attribution.
home.influencerCommission: Influencer commission: based on active tier (3%-7%)

consent.title: AI Data Processing Consent
consent.checkboxLabel: I accept the AI data processing terms

layer1.title: Quick Summary
layer1.bullet1: We use AI to personalize your experience and recommendations
layer1.bullet2: We NEVER store raw chat messages for analytics
layer1.bullet3: We do NOT process sensitive data (health, religion, orientation)
layer1.bullet4: You can withdraw consent anytime from your profile
layer1.bullet5: Our goal is to help you, not manipulate your behavior

layer2.title: Full Legal Disclosure
layer2.section1Text: The data controller is Hispaloshop, a digital e-commerce platform and intelligent food product recommendation service.
layer2.section2Text: By checking this box and continuing with registration, the user grants explicit, informed, and unambiguous consent for the processing of certain personal data as described in this document. This consent is necessary to create and maintain a user account, as certain key platform functionalities depend on such processing.
layer2.section3Text: Data is processed exclusively for: enabling basic account functionality, personalizing the experience, offering relevant recommendations, improving the catalog and services, and managing orders and support. âš ï¸ Data is NOT used for invasive advertising or external commercial profiling.
layer2.section4Text: Hispaloshop uses AI systems to improve user experience:
layer2.section4List1: Signals and inferences derived from user interactions are analyzed
layer2.section4List2: Original chat messages are NOT stored for analysis
layer2.section4List3: AI works on structured, anonymous, or aggregated data
layer2.section4List4: AI does NOT make automated decisions with legal effects on users
layer2.section5Text: May be processed: basic identifying data (name, email), food and browsing preferences, voluntarily provided information, and non-sensitive inferences from system use. âŒ Sensitive data is NOT processed: medical health, ideology, religion, sexual orientation, biometric or genetic data.
layer2.section6Text: Data will only be retained while the user account is active. If the user deletes their account, associated data is deleted or anonymized according to law. Unnecessary data is not retained indefinitely.
layer2.section7Text: Users can withdraw consent at any time from their profile. Effects:
layer2.section7List1: Personalized AI usage will be deactivated
layer2.section7List2: AI chat will no longer be available
layer2.section7List3: Account can continue to exist with limited functionality
layer2.section7List4: Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of prior processing
layer2.section8Text: Processing is carried out globally using distributed technological infrastructure. Hispaloshop applies appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure security, confidentiality, and data integrity. Outside the EU, standard contractual clauses and international security standards apply.
layer2.section9List2: Execution of the platform use contract
layer2.section9List4: Applicable legislation based on user location
layer2.section10Text: Users can exercise at any time their rights of: access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection, and portability, through the channels enabled on the platform.
layer2.section11Text: Hispaloshop commits to treating data with respect, not exploiting personal information abusively, and using technology responsibly and transparently. Our goal is to help users make better decisions, not manipulate their behavior.
layer2.section12Text: By checking the corresponding box and continuing, the user declares to have read, understood, and fully accepted this consent.
layer2.disclaimer: In case of any discrepancy between translations, the Spanish version of this document shall prevail.

layer3.title: Consent Settings
layer3.statusInactive: Analytics is disabled for your account
layer3.withdrawDescription: You can withdraw your consent at any time. This will:
layer3.withdrawEffect2: AI chat will no longer be available
layer3.withdrawEffect3: Your account can continue with limited functionality
layer3.reactivateDescription: Enable AI personalization to get better recommendations

errors.required: You must accept the data processing terms to continue

footer.description: The marketplace empowering local commerce and fostering entrepreneurship. Connecting producers with conscious consumers.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to receive news and exclusive offers

stores.title: Stores
stores.subtitle: Discover local sellers committed to quality. Support your region's commerce.
stores.ctaText: Join our seller community and bring your products to conscious customers worldwide.

becomeSeller.heroDescription: Have more than 1,000 followers? Create your unique code, offer 10% on first purchase, and earn tier-based commissions for 18 months.
becomeSeller.missionText1: At Hispaloshop, we believe in the value of artisanal work and local production. We want to give visibility to small and medium-sized honest producers who create products with passion and dedication.
becomeSeller.missionText2: Whether you are a farmer, a food artisan, or a small family business, we offer you a platform to reach customers who value quality over quantity.
becomeSeller.benefit1Desc: Earn based on your active tier (3%-7%) on attributed sales.
becomeSeller.benefit2Desc: Each referred customer generates commissions for 18 months.
becomeSeller.benefit3Desc: Get access to Pedro AI, your business partner that helps you with pricing, trends and sales strategy.
becomeSeller.benefit4Desc: Intuitive dashboard to manage products, orders, inventory, and payments from one place.
becomeSeller.benefit5Desc: Real-time analytics to understand your customers and optimize your sales.
becomeSeller.benefit6Desc: Be part of a network of producers committed to quality and authenticity.
becomeSeller.commissionTitle: You only pay when you sell
becomeSeller.commissionText: No monthly fees or hidden costs. We apply a fair commission only when you make a sale.
becomeSeller.step1Desc: Create your seller account with your company or freelancer details
becomeSeller.step2Desc: Our team reviews your profile within 24-48 hours
becomeSeller.step3Desc: For each customer you bring, you earn tier-based commission on their purchases for 18 months.
becomeSeller.step4Desc: Receive orders and get paid directly to your account
becomeSeller.ctaText: Join hundreds of sellers who already trust Hispaloshop to bring their products to customers worldwide.
becomeSeller.faq1A: Any producer, artisan, or small business that makes quality food products. We look for honest producers committed to transparency.
becomeSeller.faq2A: We use Stripe Connect for secure payments. Money is transferred directly to your bank account, minus the platform commission.
becomeSeller.faq3A: You manage shipments from your warehouse. You can use your trusted carrier or the ones we recommend for better rates.

becomeInfluencer.heroDescription: Have more than 1,000 followers? Create your unique code, offer 10% on first purchase, and earn tier-based commissions for 18 months.
becomeInfluencer.howItWorksSubtitle: It's simple: share your code, your followers save, and you earn.
becomeInfluencer.step1Desc: Sign up with your social media. If you have 1,000+ followers, you'll receive your unique code in 24-48h.
becomeInfluencer.step2Desc: Your followers use your code and get 10% off on their first purchase.
becomeInfluencer.step3Desc: For each customer you bring, you earn tier-based commission on their purchases for 18 months.
becomeInfluencer.noteText: Each referred customer generates tier-based commission (3%-7%) for 18 months from their first order.
becomeInfluencer.benefitsTitle: Why be an Influencer at Hispaloshop?
becomeInfluencer.benefit1Desc: Earn based on your active tier (3%-7%) on attributed sales.
becomeInfluencer.benefit2Desc: Each referred customer generates commissions for 18 months.
becomeInfluencer.benefit3Desc: Your followers get 10% off on their first purchase with your code.
becomeInfluencer.benefit4Desc: Dashboard with real-time statistics: sales, clicks, commissions, and performance.
becomeInfluencer.requirementsTitle: What do you need to participate?
becomeInfluencer.req1Desc: On any social network: Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Twitter...
becomeInfluencer.req2Desc: Preferably about food, lifestyle, health, or cooking.
becomeInfluencer.req3Desc: Regular posts and engagement with your audience.
becomeInfluencer.ctaDescription: Sign up as an influencer, wait for our team's approval (24-48h), and start generating income by sharing quality products.
becomeInfluencer.commissionExampleDesc: If a customer buys €100: Hispaloshop gets €18 (18%), and you receive according to your tier (example Perseo 3%: €0.54).

about.qualityDesc: Every producer is verified. No random products.
about.globalDesc: Olive oil from Spain in New York. Local currency, auto taxes.
about.aiDesc: Tell it what you need. It recommends the perfect match.
about.paymentDesc: Stripe processes everything. No hidden fees.
about.socialDesc: One tap to cart. No leaving the feed.
about.communityDesc: Meet the producer, read reviews, check certificates.
about.hero: Real products. Real producers. No middlemen.
about.heroDesc: Hispaloshop connects artisan food producers with people who want to eat better.
about.discoverDesc: Browse the feed or let AI guide you.
about.buyDesc: Secure payment with Stripe in 30 seconds.
about.buyerPoint1: Products you won't find in supermarkets
about.influencerPoint1: Personal code with discount for your audience
about.whatsNewDesc: Hispaloshop constantly evolves to offer you the best experience
about.newCatalogDesc: Complete catalog: oils, cheeses, meats, dairy, frozen foods and much more
about.newRecipesDesc: Discover recipes and buy all ingredients with just one click
about.newSocialDesc: Discover products in an Instagram-style feed. Like, comment and buy instantly
about.newI18nDesc: Available in Spanish, English and Korean. Buy and sell from any country
about.recipesFeatureDesc: Browse community recipes and add ingredients to your cart with one click
about.plansDesc: Choose the plan that best fits your business. Start free, grow without limits

sellerLanding.title: Sell your products worldwide
sellerLanding.subtitle: Join the largest community of local producers. Your online store in minutes, automatic payments, and access to 18+ countries.
sellerLanding.globalReachDesc: Sell to 18+ countries from day 1. Local currency pricing automatic.
sellerLanding.fairCommissionDesc: Only 18% per sale (Pro plan). You receive 82% direct to your bank via Stripe.
sellerLanding.influencerMatchingDesc: We connect you with content creators who promote your products.
sellerLanding.netGMVNote: Commission on NET GMV. Paid plans include 30 free days. Cancel anytime.
sellerLanding.readyDesc: Create your store for free. Only pay commission when you sell.
sellerLanding.choosePlanDesc: Start free. Grow with tools. Dominate your category.
sellerLanding.netGMVDisclaimer: Commission calculated on NET GMV (excl. shipping and taxes). PRO plan €79 + VAT/mo, ELITE plan €149 + VAT/mo.

influencerLanding.title: Earn money recommending products you love
influencerLanding.subtitle: Up to 7% commission on NET GMV (after shipping & taxes) per sale + exclusive discount for your community. 18 months attribution.
influencerLanding.step3Desc: For each customer you bring, you earn tier-based commission on their purchases for 18 months.
influencerLanding.gmvNote: NET GMV = total sale - shipping - taxes
influencerLanding.benefit1: Personal code with discount for your audience
influencerLanding.benefit5: Automatic matching with producers in your niche
influencerLanding.faq1q: How long does my commission last?
influencerLanding.faq1a: 18 months from the first purchase of each customer you refer.
influencerLanding.faq2q: How do I move up tiers?
influencerLanding.faq2a: Automatic quarterly review based on your performance (customers, GMV, repurchase).
influencerLanding.faq3a: Every 15 days, minimum $50 accumulated. Via Stripe Connect to your bank.
influencerLanding.faq4a: Yes, minimum 1,000 followers on at least one public social network.
influencerLanding.requirements: Public account, original content, ready to monetize.

sellerAI.title: Hispalo Sales AI
sellerAI.subtitle: Your sales assistant
sellerAI.welcome:
Hi! I'm Hispalo, your sales assistant. I can help you:

- Create better packs and offers
- Analyze market trends
- Optimize your pricing
- Design sales strategies
- Suggest new products

How can I help you today?
sellerAI.suggestPacksPrompt: What pack configurations do you recommend for my best-selling products?
sellerAI.analyzeTrendsPrompt: Analyze current market trends and suggest which products I should create or highlight.
sellerAI.optimizePricingPrompt: Review my current pricing and suggest adjustments to be more competitive.
sellerAI.salesStrategyPrompt: Give me a personalized sales strategy based on my current catalog.
sellerAI.productIdeasPrompt: Based on my store, what new products should I add?
sellerAI.errorRetry: Sorry, there was an error. Can you try again?
